meaning: adj.主教的,主教制度的,英国国教的
examples: The Episcopal church has seen the most turmoil.
She was in high favor at the episcopal palace of Arras.
Some 60 parishes of the Episcopal Church in the United States made similar moves last year.
Almost every American town is dotted by historic Episcopal, United Methodist, Lutheran, Presbyterian and Congregationalist churches.
My daughter is currently in 10th grade at an Episcopal School in South Carolina.
